items.hook: Former River City actor Iain Robertson jailed for nine years for rape
items.body: The 45-year-old, played Stevie O'Hara in the BBC soap, was convicted of five offences against the women between 2004 and 2019.

items.body:
Sundance film festival: Olivia Wilde, Seth Rogen, Penelope Cruz and Edward Norton are exceptional in a smart and funny winner about sex, marriage and partner-swapping

items.hook: John Yeats was an English economist and educationalist.
items.body: He wrote and lectured on commerce, geography, history and science, founded a school in Peckham, London, and was an active fellow of the Royal Geographical Society and the Society for Arts, promoting vocational skills training for international trade. One of th

items.hook: Air by Christian Kracht review – a metaphysical jigsaw puzzle
items.body:
A portal opens from our modern world of data centres and interior design into a medieval fantasy realm, in this playfully surreal tale from the author of Eurotrash

items.hook: José Paciano Laurel y García was a Filipino politician, lawyer, and judge, who served as the president of the Second Philippine Republic from 1943 to 1945, which was a Japanese puppet state during World War II.
items.body: One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Watch the total solar eclipse with ESA in León
items.body: Discover the science behind one of nature's most extraordinary phenomena and experience a total solar eclipse with the European Space Agency (ESA), the City of León and the University of León.

items.hook: Seinfeld actor apologises to reality star for 'inappropriate' sketch when she was 17
items.body: Jason Alexander said he "truly regrets" the Funny Or Die sketch he appeared in with Courtney Stodden.

items.hook: The Odyssey film fans inspired to go back to the source
items.body: Book sales and audiobook figures for Homer's original poem rise sharply after the film's release.

items.opener: Here's one for the group chat —
items.hook: The Simpsons Sing the Blues is the debut musical album by characters of The Simpsons animated franchise.
items.body: The album features these characters singing both covers and original songs in pop, blues, jazz, soul and hip-hop styles. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Thomas Lindsay Shaffer was a lawyer, professor, legal ethics scholar, dean of the Notre Dame Law School, and the most prolific American legal author, having written over 300 scholarly works.
items.body: Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: The Weapons Master (Xotar) is a supervillain who appears in various DC Comics publications.
items.body: He was created by artist Mike Sekowsky and writer Gardner Fox. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Café Josty was a Berlin café located on Potsdamer Platz.
items.body: At the beginning of 2001 a new Café Josty was opened at the Sony Center, not far from its original location; it no longer exists. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: BFI reveals next director of Filmmaking Funds
items.body: New director will take over from Mia Bays in October.
